name: reply_pattern_multiline
description: Exercises the ``(?m)`` opt-in for ``reply_pattern``. Default semantics: ``re.search`` with ``re.IGNORECASE``; ``^`` and ``$`` anchor to the whole reply. Inline ``(?m)`` switches each pattern to multiline mode so ``^``/``$`` anchor to each line. Patterns compile through ``belt._regex_policy.compile_user_regex`` (see SCORING.md §1.3).

turns.message:
Reply with EXACTLY three lines, in this format, nothing else:
ORDER-001 shipped
ORDER-002 pending
ORDER-003 delivered
